## How to Install
### Windows
Simply run the executable file that has `Windows` in its name. It will prompt you to install the ViGEmBus driver if you don't have it already. You can either use the bundled installer (by following the prompts) or install it from [https://github.com/nefarius/ViGEmBus/releases/tag/v1.22.0](https://github.com/nefarius/ViGEmBus/releases/tag/v1.22.0)

### Linux
The linux binary is not yet built, nor is it tested. For now, follow the instructions in the readme to either use the python file directly or compile it with Nuitka.
